name: Cheese Mushroom Suffle
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a frying pan; add mushrooms and onion, stirring until all liquid evaporates, about 5 minutes.
2. Add seasonings and flour; stir until blended.
3. Gradually stir in milk and sherry. Blend in egg yolks one at a time.
4. In a separate bowl, beat egg whites until stiff peaks form. Fold whites into mushroom mixture until just blended.
5. Fold in about 4/5 of the cheese.
6. Spoon mixture into buttered individual souffle dishes or a single large souffle dish.
7. Sprinkle remaining cheese on top.
8. Bake small dishes for 25-30 minutes at 375 degrees. Bake large souffle at 350 degrees for 35-40 minutes, or until puffy and golden. Serve immediately.
